name: Somersault Strike of the Drunken Monkey

system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Arm Strike or Leg Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You flip into a somersault and splay your limbs to strike a foe with your outstretched arms or legs. Make an Arm Strike or Leg Strike roll against your opponent’s parry. On a Success you do normal Damage plus they have to make an Endurance roll (TN 5 +1 per your Rank in Waijia) to avoid being dazed for one round (they can take no actions for one round). On a Total Success the opponent is dazed for two rounds if they fail their Endurance roll. This Technique requires the user be inebriated by alcohol. Cathartic: On a Cathartic use you plow down with great force and do 3 Extra Wounds (as well as the normal effects).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Arm Strike or Leg Strike against Parry
system.targetEffects: Target rolls Endurance TN 5 + user's Waijia Rank or is dazed for 1 round
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: Target rolls Endurance TN 5 + user's Waijia Rank or is dazed for 2 rounds
system.requirementNotes: This Technique requires the user be inebriated by alcohol.
system.catharticEffect: On a Cathartic use you plow down with great force and do 3 Extra Wounds (as well as the normal effects).
